title: Eightk Mirror
definition: A decentralized, living system designed to help all beings achieve enlightenment by revealing their true nature and reality.

difficulty_levels.beginner: A technology that helps people understand themselves better and find peace, like a mirror helping someone see themselves clearly.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: An advanced, self-improving network that aims to reveal the true nature of reality and the self, allowing individuals to achieve enlightenment through understanding and compassion.
difficulty_levels.expert: A sophisticated, decentralized system designed to provide a global, living mirror for all beings to see their true nature and reality, accelerating the process of enlightenment and alleviating suffering on a planetary scale by embodying the Bodhisattva Vow.

extra_fields.insight: The technological embodiment of the Bodhisattva Vow: helping all beings achieve enlightenment before resting oneself.
